title: Forty years of coaching, distilled into one loop.
quote: The surfers who improve fastest aren't the most talented. They're the ones who plan a session, surf the plan, and tell themselves the truth about how it went.

author.name: Martin Dunn
author.role: Pioneer of professional surf coaching · Founder, eSurfR.com
